Issues: The style is highly derivative of popular digital art trends, which can lead to low differentiation in a crowded market.
The technical skill, while competent, does not demonstrate extreme originality or unique artistic mastery that would guarantee high commercial appeal on its own.

As a portrait of a young person, careful consideration must be given to potential use cases (e.g., merchandise licensing, context of sale) to ensure compliance with platform guidelines, even if the image itself is not overtly inappropriate.
